project.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this project?
project.noProjects: No projects yet. Add a Meilisearch instance to get started.

index.primaryKeyHint: The primary key will be inferred from the first document if not set.
index.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this index?
index.noIndexes: No indexes found. Create a new index to get started.
index.deleteIndexDesc: This will permanently delete the index {{indexId}} and all its documents. This action cannot be undone.

document.addDocumentsDesc: Add documents to the index via JSON or file upload.
document.addSuccess: Documents added successfully. A task has been enqueued.
document.deleteDocumentDesc: Are you sure you want to delete document:
document.deleteSuccess: Document deleted. A task has been enqueued.
document.deleteAllDocumentsDesc: This will permanently delete all {{count}} documents from this index. This action cannot be undone.
document.noDocumentsDesc: Add documents to this index to start searching.
document.invalidJson: Invalid JSON format. Please provide a valid JSON array or object.
document.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this document?
document.deleteAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete ALL documents?
document.customHeadersHint: JSON format request headers for the URL fetch. e.g. {"Authorization": "Bearer token"}
document.invalidHeadersFormat: Invalid headers format. Please provide valid JSON.

vector.noEmbedders: No embedders configured. Configure embedders in index settings first.
vector.noVectorEngine: No vector engine configured for this index
vector.configureFirst: Please configure vector engine in index settings first
vector.hybridInfo1: Hybrid search combines keyword matching and semantic understanding
vector.hybridInfo2: Higher semantic ratio focuses more on content meaning than literal matching
vector.hybridInfo3: Requires embedder configuration in Embedders first

export.description: Export the current search query in different formats.

task.cancelAllPendingDesc: This will cancel all enqueued and processing tasks. This action cannot be undone.
task.cancelSingleTaskDesc: Are you sure you want to cancel this task?
task.deleteSingleTaskDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this task?
task.deleteCompletedDesc: This will delete all completed, failed, and canceled tasks.

key.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this API key?

embedder.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this embedder? This will trigger re-indexing of all documents.
embedder.noEmbeddersDesc: Configure vector embedders for AI-powered semantic and hybrid search.
embedder.experimentalNote: Embedder configuration requires the vectorStore experimental feature to be enabled.

fields.apiKeyHint: Leave empty to use environment variable OPENAI_API_KEY.
fields.urlOptional: URL (optional, for proxy or custom endpoint)
fields.documentTemplateHint: Liquid template for generating text from documents. Use {{doc.field_name}} to reference fields.
fields.requestTemplateHint: JSON template for the request body. Use {{text}} as placeholder for the input text.
fields.responsePathHint: JSON path to extract embeddings from the response.
fields.userProvidedInfo: With User Provided source, you must manually include vectors in your documents using the _vectors field.

settings.appDescription: A cross-platform desktop client for managing Meilisearch instances.

attribute.allFieldsAdded: All available fields have been added.
attribute.filterableDesc: Attributes that can be used as filters in search queries.
attribute.searchableDesc: Attributes used for search. Order defines relevance priority.
attribute.sortableDesc: Attributes that can be used to sort search results.

rankingRules.title: Ranking Rules
rankingRules.description: Rules that determine how search results are sorted. Order matters — rules are applied sequentially.
rankingRules.words: Results are sorted by decreasing number of matched query terms
rankingRules.typo: Results are sorted by increasing number of typos
rankingRules.proximity: Results are sorted by increasing distance between matched query terms
rankingRules.attribute: Results are sorted according to the attribute ranking order
rankingRules.sort: Results are sorted according to parameters decided at query time
rankingRules.exactness: Results are sorted by the similarity of the matched words with the query words

synonyms.description: Define synonyms so different words return the same results.
synonyms.exampleDesc: If you set {{word}} with synonyms {{synonyms}}, searching for "phone" will also return results containing "mobile" or "cellphone".

typoTolerance.description: Configure how Meilisearch handles typos in search queries.
typoTolerance.enabledDesc: Toggle typo tolerance on or off
typoTolerance.disableOnWordsDesc: Words where typo tolerance should not be applied.
typoTolerance.disableOnAttributesDesc: Attributes where typo tolerance should not be applied.

prefixSearch.description: Prefix search allows matching documents that begin with a specific query term. For example, searching for "hel" would match "hello", "help", "helicopter", etc.
prefixSearch.indexingTimeDesc: Prefix search data is computed during indexing. This uses more storage but provides faster search performance.
prefixSearch.disabledDesc: Prefix search is disabled. Only exact word matches will be returned.
prefixSearch.note: This setting is enabled by default and computed during indexing for optimal performance. Disabling it reduces index size but limits search functionality.

stopWords.title: Stop Words
stopWords.description: Words that are ignored in search queries. Common examples: the, a, an, is, at.

separators.title: Separator Tokens
separators.description: Characters used to separate words during indexing. By default, Meilisearch uses spaces and punctuation.

dictionary.title: Dictionary
dictionary.description: Custom words that Meilisearch should recognize as single terms during indexing.

pagination.description: Configure the maximum number of hits that can be returned by a search query.
pagination.hint: Default: 1000. Higher values may impact performance.

faceting.description: Configure the maximum number of values returned per facet in search results.
faceting.hint: Default: 100. The maximum number of distinct values for each facet.

searchCutoff.description: Configure the maximum duration of a search query in milliseconds. Meilisearch will stop searching after this time and return the best results found so far.
searchCutoff.disableCutoff: Disable search cutoff (searches will run until completion)
searchCutoff.rec1500: Default, suitable for most use cases
searchCutoff.rec500: For real-time search with strict latency requirements
searchCutoff.rec3000: For complex queries on large datasets

vectorStoreSetting.name: Vector Store
vectorStoreSetting.desc: Enable vector search and AI-powered search functionality.

metrics.name: Metrics
metrics.desc: Expose Prometheus metrics at the /metrics endpoint.

logsRoute.name: Logs Route
logsRoute.desc: Enable the /logs route for viewing instance logs.

containsFilter.name: Contains Filter
containsFilter.desc: Enable the CONTAINS filter operator for string matching.

editDocumentsByFunction.name: Edit by Function
editDocumentsByFunction.desc: Allow editing documents using a JavaScript function.

network.name: Network
network.desc: Enable network features for remote interactions.

chatCompletions.name: Chat Completions
chatCompletions.desc: Enable the chat completions API endpoint.
